scenario: Single filer with W-2 wages $38,000 and 1099-C cancellation of debt income $6,000 (taxable student loan forgiveness outside education exclusion)
source: IRS Pub 17 TY2025, Chapter 8: Other Income, Canceled Debts section p. 68–70; Form 1099-C. All values IRS-stated, none computed by agent.
